scripts.test:backend: bun run test:backend:unit && bun run test:backend:integration
scripts.test:backend:unit: cd packages/backend && uv run pytest tests/unit/ -v
scripts.test:backend:integration: cd packages/backend && uv run pytest tests/integration/ -v
scripts.lint: bun run lint:web && bun run lint:backend
scripts.lint:backend: cd packages/backend && uv run ruff check .
scripts.lint:fix: bun run lint:fix:web && bun run lint:fix:backend
scripts.lint:fix:backend: cd packages/backend && uv run ruff check --fix .
scripts.fmt: bun run fmt:web && bun run fmt:backend
scripts.fmt:backend: cd packages/backend && uv run ruff format .
scripts.fmt:check: bun run fmt:check:web && bun run fmt:check:backend
scripts.fmt:check:backend: cd packages/backend && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:web && bun run typecheck:backend
scripts.typecheck:backend: cd packages/backend && uv run mypy src/ relay_server.py addon.py
